message:
feat(ftui-tty): Unix raw mode + terminal feature toggles (bd-lff4p.4.2)

Implement RAII raw mode via RawModeGuard backed by nix termios,
escape sequence constants for all terminal features (mouse, paste,
focus, kitty keyboard, alt screen, sync output), incremental feature
delta writes, and full cleanup sequence on Drop. 14 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
